title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, struggling to get paid for your ebooks, courses, or software due to PayPal's hold periods. You've tried Gumroad, but their payout delays are killing your cash flow. You've got a buyer in the Philippines, but converting Bitcoin to Philippine Peso through traditional means is a nightmare. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in – a complete infrastructure for digital creators like you, no PayPal required.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The beauty of NOWPayments lies in its seamless integration with Unchained Commerce's Core Engine. With automated delivery and payment verification, you get instant access to your earnings, no hold periods or payout delays to worry about. Your buyers get instant access to their purchases, no lengthy wait times or frustration. This is the solution you've been searching for – a complete digital store infrastructure that works, no matter where you're from or what your buyers use.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your NOWPayments digital store, you'll need a NOWPayments account, Unchained Commerce's Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. The good news is that all these components come bundled in our Full Stack Bundle, a comprehensive infrastructure for building and running your digital store. This bundle includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, ensuring you're always up and running smoothly.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

The settlement speed difference between crypto and conventional platforms is not incremental — it is categorical. USDT on Tron settles in under 60 seconds. Bitcoin Lightning settles in seconds with negligible fees. On-chain Bitcoin settles in 10-60 minutes depending on network congestion. Compare this to PayPal's 3-5 business day bank transfer, Gumroad's weekly or monthly payout cycles, or wire transfers that take 3-7 days and cost $20-50 in bank fees each way. For a creator who needs to pay for tools, services, or simply cover expenses, the difference between instant settlement and a 30-day payout cycle is not just inconvenient — it is a cash flow problem that affects what you can build.
NOWPayments integrates seamlessly with Unchained Commerce's Core Engine, eliminating hold periods and payout delays.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live. Configure your store URL, add your digital products, and start promoting your store. The Admin Dashboard will help you manage orders, track analytics, and monitor your store's performance in real-time. With Unchained Commerce's Core Engine, you can rest assured that your buyers will always get instant access to their purchases.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Admin Dashboard's transaction log gives you a complete audit trail of every payment your store has processed. Each entry includes the transaction hash, which you can verify independently on any blockchain explorer. This means you have cryptographic proof of every payment that does not depend on any platform's records. If a buyer claims they paid but the transaction is not in your log, you can check the blockchain directly. If a transaction shows as confirmed on-chain but your delivery system did not fire, the Admin Dashboard flags it for manual review. This level of transparency and verifiability is not available with conventional payment processors, where transaction data is owned by the platform and subject to their record-keeping policies.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
With our Full Stack Bundle, you get instant access to everything you need to build and run a successful digital store – no complicated setup required.
